LearnedGateFuser.reason: LearnedGateFuser requires a two-specialist setup; current run uses 3 specialists

uncertainty_calibration.note: Validation split size governs stability of uncertainty calibration.

paired_significance_testing.note: Test split paired query count governs inferential precision.

per_domain_analysis.note: Lowest-count domain determines whether per-domain inference is stable.

definitions.high_specialist_disagreement: specialist_disagreement >= median (entropy-normalized precision distribution across specialists)
definitions.high_uncertainty_spread: uncertainty_spread >= median (max sigma2 - min sigma2 across specialists)
definitions.single_domain_clear_winner: is_multi_domain == False and router_confidence >= high-confidence threshold
definitions.true_multi_domain_queries: is_multi_domain == True (secondary_domain exists and differs from dominant_domain, with fallback to selected specialist count > 1)

slice_definition.name: preregistered_high_disagreement_high_uncertainty_multi_domain_low_router_confidence
slice_definition.description: specialist_disagreement >= median AND uncertainty_spread >= median AND router_confidence <= 33rd percentile AND is_multi_domain == True
slice_definition.reason: Pre-declared confirmatory slice exactly follows the preregistered contract: high specialist disagreement, high uncertainty spread, low router confidence, and multi-domain queries only.

warnings: Confirmatory slice contains zero paired queries; inferential testing is skipped.

slice_definition.name: hostile_disagreement_calibration_routing_ambiguity
slice_definition.reason: Adversarial slice intersects high disagreement, low router confidence, and high uncertainty spread to stress disagreement, routing ambiguity, and calibration error proxies together.

warnings: Hostile slice contains zero paired queries; inferential testing is skipped.

benchmark_status.status_note: Sample is toy-scale for Kalman-vs-mean claims; treat outcomes as smoke-test signals only.

claim_success_decision.question: May we honestly claim 'Kalman fusion beats mean fusion'?
claim_success_decision.hard_rule: Allowed only if benchmark_status == claim_ready, confirmatory slice verdict == supported, and all required baseline decisions (mean, weighted_mean, router_only_top1) are supported.
